title: spiesia ochroleuca
intro: Spiesia ochroleuca, also known as the Yellow Mountain tea, is a type of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Spiesia ochroleuca include reducing fever, improving digestion, and relieving stress, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, Spiesia ochroleuca is typically brewed into a tea or used in combination with other herbs to create a medicinal infusion.
